cards.title: Variables, Domains, and Constraints
cards.governance_note: Review variable definitions, domains, hard constraints, soft constraints, and feasibility logic.

cards.title: Feasibility, Pruning, and Propagation

cards.title: Traceability, Exceptions, and Fairness
cards.governance_note: Preserve violation reports, assignment traces, exception pathways, appeal routes, and fairness review.
